name: vendor.myndhyve.market-intel-crew
description: MyndHyve Market Intelligence research-director crew. Wraps the 9 vendor.myndhyve.market-intel-* node typeIds into a research-director agent persona that orchestrates the VoC → ad-angles pipeline from a single chat-driven dispatch. Vendor showcase agent pack.
author: MyndHyve

agents.label: Market Intel Research Director
agents.description: Single chat-driven persona over the full MyndHyve Market Intel pipeline. Translates a user brief ("research the ICP for X") into orchestrated calls across query-builder → discovery → community-rank → thread-triage → content-extraction → voc-extraction → opportunity-scoring → ad-angles → audience-targeting. Persists ICP / topic / cycle results to long-term memory for re-use across runs.
